<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="en">
<head>
<meta charset="UTF-8">
<meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0">
<title>Meridian Spa & Wellness</title>
<link rel="preconnect" href="https://fonts.googleapis.com">
<link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Cormorant+Garamond:ital,wght@0,300;0,400;0,600;1,300;1,400&family=Jost:wght@200;300;400;500&display=swap" rel="stylesheet">
<style>
*{margin:0;padding:0;box-sizing:border-box;}
:root{
  --gold:#b8965a;
  --gold-light:#d4b07a;
  --gold-dim:rgba(184,150,90,0.08);
  --gold-border:rgba(184,150,90,0.25);
  --dark:#08090d;
  --dark2:#0f1116;
  --dark3:#161820;
  --text:#e8e4dc;
  --muted:#8a8578;
  --muted2:#5a5650;
}
html{scroll-behavior:smooth;}
body{
  background:var(--dark);
  color:var(--text);
  font-family:'Jost',sans-serif;
  font-weight:300;
  line-height:1.7;
  overflow-x:hidden;
}

/* ── NAV ── */
nav{
  position:fixed;top:0;left:0;right:0;z-index:100;
  padding:20px 40px;
  display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:space-between;
  background:linear-gradient(180deg,rgba(8,9,13,0.95) 0%,transparent 100%);
  backdrop-filter:blur(12px);
  border-bottom:1px solid rgba(184,150,90,0.1);
}
.nav-logo{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:12px;text-decoration:none;}
.nav-logo img{width:36px;height:36px;object-fit:contain;}
.nav-wordmark{font-family:'Cormorant Garamond',serif;font-size:20px;font-weight:600;letter-spacing:4px;text-transform:uppercase;color:var(--gold);}
.nav-links{display:flex;gap:36px;}
.nav-links a{color:var(--muted);text-decoration:none;font-size:12px;font-weight:400;letter-spacing:2px;text-transform:uppercase;transition:color 0.3s;}
.nav-links a:hover{color:var(--gold);}
.nav-cta{padding:10px 24px;border:1px solid var(--gold-border);color:var(--gold);text-decoration:none;font-size:11px;font-weight:400;letter-spacing:2px;text-transform:uppercase;transition:all 0.3s;border-radius:2px;}
.nav-cta:hover{background:var(--gold-dim);}

/* ── HERO ── */
.hero{
  min-height:100vh;
  display:flex;flex-direction:column;align-items:center;justify-content:center;
  text-align:center;
  padding:120px 40px 80px;
  position:relative;
  overflow:hidden;
}
.hero-bg{
  position:absolute;inset:0;
  background:radial-gradient(ellipse 80% 60% at 50% 40%, rgba(184,150,90,0.06) 0%, transparent 70%);
  pointer-events:none;
}
.hero-lines{
  position:absolute;inset:0;
  background-image:linear-gradient(rgba(184,150,90,0.04) 1px,transparent 1px),linear-gradient(90deg,rgba(184,150,90,0.04) 1px,transparent 1px);
  background-size:60px 60px;
  pointer-events:none;
}
.hero-eyebrow{
  font-size:11px;font-weight:400;letter-spacing:4px;text-transform:uppercase;
  color:var(--gold);margin-bottom:28px;
  opacity:0;animation:fadeUp 1s 0.2s forwards;
}
.hero-logo{
  width:110px;height:110px;object-fit:contain;margin-bottom:28px;
  opacity:0;animation:fadeUp 1s 0.4s forwards;
  filter:drop-shadow(0 0 40px rgba(184,150,90,0.3));
}
.hero-title{
  font-family:'Cormorant Garamond',serif;
  font-size:clamp(52px,8vw,96px);
  font-weight:300;
  letter-spacing:12px;
  text-transform:uppercase;
  line-height:1;
  color:var(--text);
  margin-bottom:8px;
  opacity:0;animation:fadeUp 1s 0.6s forwards;
}
.hero-subtitle{
  font-family:'Cormorant Garamond',serif;
  font-size:clamp(14px,2vw,18px);
  font-weight:300;
  font-style:italic;
  letter-spacing:3px;
  color:var(--gold-light);
  margin-bottom:40px;
  opacity:0;animation:fadeUp 1s 0.8s forwards;
}
.hero-divider{
  width:80px;height:1px;background:var(--gold-border);margin:0 auto 40px;
  opacity:0;animation:fadeUp 1s 0.9s forwards;
}
.hero-tagline{
  font-size:15px;font-weight:300;color:var(--muted);
  max-width:520px;line-height:1.9;
  opacity:0;animation:fadeUp 1s 1s forwards;
  margin-bottom:52px;
}
.hero-btns{
  display:flex;gap:16px;flex-wrap:wrap;justify-content:center;
  opacity:0;animation:fadeUp 1s 1.2s forwards;
}
.btn-primary{
  padding:16px 40px;
  background:var(--gold);color:#0a0900;
  text-decoration:none;font-size:11px;font-weight:500;
  letter-spacing:3px;text-transform:uppercase;
  border-radius:2px;transition:all 0.3s;
}
.btn-primary:hover{background:var(--gold-light);transform:translateY(-1px);}
.btn-outline{
  padding:16px 40px;
  border:1px solid var(--gold-border);color:var(--gold);
  text-decoration:none;font-size:11px;font-weight:400;
  letter-spacing:3px;text-transform:uppercase;
  border-radius:2px;transition:all 0.3s;
}
.btn-outline:hover{background:var(--gold-dim);transform:translateY(-1px);}
.hero-scroll{
  position:absolute;bottom:36px;left:50%;transform:translateX(-50%);
  display:flex;flex-direction:column;align-items:center;gap:8px;
  color:var(--muted2);font-size:10px;letter-spacing:2px;text-transform:uppercase;
  opacity:0;animation:fadeUp 1s 1.5s forwards;
}
.scroll-line{width:1px;height:40px;background:linear-gradient(180deg,var(--gold-border),transparent);animation:scrollLine 2s infinite;}

/* ── SECTIONS ── */
section{padding:100px 40px;max-width:1200px;margin:0 auto;}
.section-eyebrow{font-size:10px;font-weight:400;letter-spacing:4px;text-transform:uppercase;color:var(--gold);margin-bottom:16px;}
.section-title{font-family:'Cormorant Garamond',serif;font-size:clamp(36px,5vw,58px);font-weight:300;line-height:1.1;margin-bottom:24px;}
.section-divider{width:60px;height:1px;background:var(--gold-border);margin-bottom:32px;}
.section-body{font-size:15px;color:var(--muted);line-height:1.9;max-width:640px;}

/* ── PHILOSOPHY ── */
.philosophy-wrap{
  background:var(--dark2);border:1px solid var(--gold-border);
  border-radius:4px;padding:80px;margin:0 -20px;
  position:relative;overflow:hidden;
}
.philosophy-wrap::before{
  content:'';position:absolute;top:0;left:0;right:0;height:1px;
  background:linear-gradient(90deg,transparent,var(--gold),transparent);
}
.philosophy-quote{
  font-family:'Cormorant Garamond',serif;
  font-size:clamp(22px,3vw,34px);
  font-weight:300;font-style:italic;
  line-height:1.5;color:var(--text);
  margin-bottom:28px;
}
.philosophy-quote em{color:var(--gold-light);font-style:normal;}
.philosophy-body{font-size:15px;color:var(--muted);line-height:1.9;max-width:700px;}

/* ── PILLARS ── */
.pillars-grid{
  display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(auto-fit,minmax(240px,1fr));
  gap:2px;margin-top:60px;
}
.pillar{
  padding:48px 36px;background:var(--dark2);
  border:1px solid rgba(184,150,90,0.08);
  transition:all 0.4s;cursor:default;
}
.pillar:hover{background:var(--dark3);border-color:var(--gold-border);transform:translateY(-4px);}
.pillar-num{
  font-family:'Cormorant Garamond',serif;
  font-size:48px;font-weight:300;color:var(--gold-border);
  line-height:1;margin-bottom:20px;
}
.pillar-title{
  font-family:'Cormorant Garamond',serif;
  font-size:22px;font-weight:400;margin-bottom:12px;color:var(--text);
}
.pillar-body{font-size:13px;color:var(--muted);line-height:1.8;}

/* ── APP SECTION ── */
.app-section{
  background:var(--dark2);
  border-top:1px solid var(--gold-border);
  border-bottom:1px solid var(--gold-border);
  padding:100px 40px;
  margin:0;max-width:100%;
}
.app-inner{max-width:1200px;margin:0 auto;display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;gap:80px;align-items:center;}
.app-features{display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:20px;margin-top:40px;}
.app-feature{
  display:flex;align-items:flex-start;gap:16px;
  padding:18px;border-radius:4px;
  border:1px solid rgba(184,150,90,0.06);
  background:rgba(184,150,90,0.02);
  transition:all 0.3s;
}
.app-feature:hover{border-color:var(--gold-border);background:var(--gold-dim);}
.af-icon{font-size:20px;margin-top:2px;}
.af-title{font-size:14px;font-weight:400;color:var(--text);margin-bottom:3px;}
.af-body{font-size:12px;color:var(--muted);line-height:1.6;}
.app-phone-wrap{
  display:flex;justify-content:center;align-items:center;
  position:relative;
}
.app-phone{
  width:220px;
  background:var(--dark3);
  border:1px solid var(--gold-border);
  border-radius:32px;
  padding:28px 16px;
  box-shadow:0 40px 80px rgba(0,0,0,0.6),0 0 60px rgba(184,150,90,0.08);
  position:relative;
}
.app-phone::before{
  content:'';position:absolute;top:12px;left:50%;transform:translateX(-50%);
  width:60px;height:4px;background:var(--dark);border-radius:2px;
}
.phone-screen{
  background:var(--dark);border-radius:20px;overflow:hidden;padding:16px 12px;
}
.phone-logo{text-align:center;margin-bottom:12px;}
.phone-logo img{width:36px;height:36px;object-fit:contain;}
.phone-wordmark{font-family:'Cormorant Garamond',serif;font-size:13px;letter-spacing:3px;text-transform:uppercase;color:var(--gold);text-align:center;margin-bottom:14px;}
.phone-stat-grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr 1fr;gap:4px;margin-bottom:8px;}
.ps{background:var(--dark2);border-radius:6px;padding:8px 4px;text-align:center;}
.ps-val{font-size:13px;font-weight:500;color:var(--text);}
.ps-lbl{font-size:8px;color:var(--muted);text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:0.5px;margin-top:1px;}
.phone-bar{height:3px;background:var(--dark2);border-radius:2px;margin-bottom:8px;overflow:hidden;}
.phone-bar-fill{height:100%;background:linear-gradient(90deg,var(--gold),var(--gold-light));border-radius:2px;width:65%;}
.phone-label{font-size:8px;color:var(--muted);text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:1px;margin-bottom:5px;}
.phone-meal{background:var(--dark2);border-radius:6px;padding:8px 10px;margin-bottom:4px;display:flex;justify-content:space-between;align-items:center;}
.pm-name{font-size:10px;color:var(--text);}
.pm-cal{font-size:9px;color:var(--gold);}

/* ── MEMBERSHIP ── */
.membership-grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(auto-fit,minmax(280px,1fr));gap:2px;margin-top:60px;}
.membership-card{
  padding:52px 40px;
  background:var(--dark2);
  border:1px solid rgba(184,150,90,0.08);
  position:relative;overflow:hidden;
  transition:all 0.4s;
}
.membership-card:hover{border-color:var(--gold-border);transform:translateY(-4px);}
.membership-card.featured{
  border-color:var(--gold-border);
  background:linear-gradient(135deg,var(--dark2),var(--dark3));
}
.membership-card.featured::before{
  content:'Founding Member';
  position:absolute;top:20px;right:20px;
  font-size:9px;letter-spacing:2px;text-transform:uppercase;
  color:var(--gold);background:var(--gold-dim);
  padding:4px 12px;border-radius:2px;border:1px solid var(--gold-border);
}
.mc-title{font-family:'Cormorant Garamond',serif;font-size:26px;font-weight:400;margin-bottom:8px;}
.mc-price{font-size:13px;color:var(--muted);margin-bottom:28px;font-style:italic;}
.mc-features{list-style:none;display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:12px;}
.mc-features li{font-size:13px;color:var(--muted);padding-left:20px;position:relative;line-height:1.5;}
.mc-features li::before{content:'—';position:absolute;left:0;color:var(--gold);}

/* ── FOOTER ── */
footer{
  border-top:1px solid rgba(184,150,90,0.15);
  padding:60px 40px 40px;
  text-align:center;
}
.footer-logo{display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;gap:12px;margin-bottom:16px;}
.footer-logo img{width:32px;height:32px;object-fit:contain;opacity:0.7;}
.footer-wordmark{font-family:'Cormorant Garamond',serif;font-size:18px;letter-spacing:4px;text-transform:uppercase;color:var(--gold);opacity:0.7;}
.footer-tagline{font-size:12px;color:var(--muted2);letter-spacing:2px;margin-bottom:32px;}
.footer-links{display:flex;gap:32px;justify-content:center;margin-bottom:40px;flex-wrap:wrap;}
.footer-links a{color:var(--muted2);text-decoration:none;font-size:11px;letter-spacing:1.5px;text-transform:uppercase;transition:color 0.3s;}
.footer-links a:hover{color:var(--gold);}
.footer-copy{font-size:11px;color:var(--muted2);}

/* ── ANIMATIONS ── */
@keyframes fadeUp{from{opacity:0;transform:translateY(24px);}to{opacity:1;transform:translateY(0);}}
@keyframes scrollLine{0%,100%{opacity:0.3;transform:scaleY(0.5);}50%{opacity:1;transform:scaleY(1);}}

/* ── REVEAL ON SCROLL ── */
.reveal{opacity:0;transform:translateY(32px);transition:opacity 0.8s,transform 0.8s;}
.reveal.visible{opacity:1;transform:none;}
.reveal-delay-1{transition-delay:0.1s;}
.reveal-delay-2{transition-delay:0.2s;}
.reveal-delay-3{transition-delay:0.3s;}
.reveal-delay-4{transition-delay:0.4s;}

/* ── RESPONSIVE ── */
@media(max-width:768px){
  nav{padding:16px 20px;}
  .nav-links{display:none;}
  .philosophy-wrap{padding:40px 24px;margin:0;}
  .app-inner{grid-template-columns:1fr;gap:48px;}
  .app-phone-wrap{order:-1;}
  section{padding:72px 24px;}
  .app-section{padding:72px 24px;}
  footer{padding:48px 24px 32px;}
  .hero{padding:100px 24px 80px;}
}
</style>
</head>
<body>

<!-- NAV -->
<nav>
  <a href="#" class="nav-logo">
    <img src="data:image/png;base64," alt="Meridian">
    <span class="nav-wordmark">Meridian</span>
  </a>
  <div class="nav-links">
    <a href="#philosophy">Philosophy</a>
    <a href="#experience">Experience</a>
    <a href="#spa">The Spa</a>
    <a href="#science">Science</a>
    <a href="#locations">Locations</a>
    <a href="#app">The App</a>
    <a href="#membership">Membership</a>
  </div>
  <a href="#membership" class="nav-cta">Join the Waitlist</a>
</nav>

<!-- HERO -->
<div class="hero">
  <div class="hero-bg"></div>
  <div class="hero-lines"></div>
  <div class="hero-eyebrow">Nordic Spa &amp; Wellness</div>
  <img src="data:image/png;base64," class="hero-logo" alt="Meridian Logo">
  <h1 class="hero-title">Meridian</h1>
  <p class="hero-subtitle">Spa &amp; Wellness</p>
  <div class="hero-divider"></div>
  <p class="hero-tagline">Where mind, body, and soul arrive at balance. A Nordic sanctuary designed for longevity — through thermal ritual, genuine connection, and intentional movement.</p>
  <div class="hero-btns">
    <a href="#membership" class="btn-primary">Join the Waitlist</a>
    <a href="https://gbono2026.github.io/my-schedule" target="_blank" class="btn-outline">Open the App</a>
  </div>
  <div class="hero-scroll">
    <div class="scroll-line"></div>
    <span>Discover</span>
  </div>
</div>

<!-- PHILOSOPHY -->
<div id="philosophy" style="background:var(--dark2);border-top:1px solid rgba(184,150,90,0.12);">
<section>
  <div class="reveal">
    <div class="section-eyebrow">Our Belief</div>
    <h2 class="section-title">The environment<br><em style="color:var(--gold-light);font-style:italic;">is the medicine</em></h2>
    <div class="section-divider"></div>
  </div>
  <div class="philosophy-wrap reveal reveal-delay-1">
    <p class="philosophy-quote">"Modern medicine has become expert at managing symptoms. We are building a place that addresses <em>causes</em> — stress, isolation, sedentary living, disconnection from the body."</p>
    <p class="philosophy-body">Socialization, stress reduction, and controlled physical demands on the body are the true drivers of longevity and quality of life. Not more procedures. Not more prescriptions. The research is clear — and Meridian is the practical answer to what it shows.</p>
  </div>
</section>
</div>

<!-- PILLARS -->
<div id="experience">
<section>
  <div class="reveal">
    <div class="section-eyebrow">The Experience</div>
    <h2 class="section-title">Four pillars of<br>whole-person wellness</h2>
    <div class="section-divider"></div>
    <p class="section-body">Most wellness businesses offer a single modality. Meridian offers a complete lifestyle system — the physical space, the community, the data, and the coaching — under one membership.</p>
  </div>
  <div class="pillars-grid">
    <div class="pillar reveal reveal-delay-1">
      <div class="pillar-num">01</div>
      <div class="pillar-title">Thermal Ritual</div>
      <p class="pillar-body">Sauna, cold plunge, and contrast therapy drawn from Nordic tradition. Heat and cold as tools for recovery, circulation, and nervous system regulation.</p>
    </div>
    <div class="pillar reveal reveal-delay-2">
      <div class="pillar-num">02</div>
      <div class="pillar-title">Genuine Connection</div>
      <p class="pillar-body">Social spaces designed for real conversation. Loneliness is a chronic health risk. Meridian is built around the understanding that community is not a perk — it is the point.</p>
    </div>
    <div class="pillar reveal reveal-delay-3">
      <div class="pillar-num">03</div>
      <div class="pillar-title">Intentional Movement</div>
      <p class="pillar-body">Low-impact, restorative, purposeful. Not performance for its own sake — movement calibrated to the body's actual needs on any given day.</p>
    </div>
    <div class="pillar reveal reveal-delay-4">
      <div class="pillar-num">04</div>
      <div class="pillar-title">Restorative Quiet</div>
      <p class="pillar-body">Space to breathe, decompress, and reset. In a world designed for stimulation, stillness is a radical act. We protect it.</p>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>
</div>


<!-- SPA CONCEPT -->
<div id="spa" style="background:var(--dark);padding:0;">
  <!-- Full bleed photo -->
  <div style="position:relative;overflow:hidden;max-height:620px;">
    <img src="data:image/jpeg;base64," 
         alt="Meridian thermal experience — barrel sauna, hot tub, cold plunge, fire pit"
         style="width:100%;height:620px;object-fit:cover;object-position:center 40%;display:block;">
    <div style="position:absolute;inset:0;background:linear-gradient(180deg,rgba(8,9,13,0.2) 0%,rgba(8,9,13,0.7) 100%);"></div>
    <div style="position:absolute;bottom:48px;left:50%;transform:translateX(-50%);text-align:center;width:90%;max-width:700px;">
      <p style="font-size:10px;font-weight:400;letter-spacing:4px;text-transform:uppercase;color:var(--gold);margin-bottom:12px;">The Thermal Circuit</p>
      <h2 style="font-family:'Cormorant Garamond',serif;font-size:clamp(28px,4vw,52px);font-weight:300;line-height:1.1;color:white;margin-bottom:0;">Heat. Cold. Rest. Repeat.</h2>
    </div>
  </div>

  <!-- Concept description -->
  <div style="max-width:1200px;margin:0 auto;padding:80px 40px;">
    <div style="display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;gap:80px;align-items:start;" class="concept-grid">
      <div class="reveal">
        <div class="section-eyebrow">The Space</div>
        <h2 class="section-title" style="font-size:clamp(28px,4vw,44px);">A sanctuary built around contrast</h2>
        <div class="section-divider"></div>
        <p style="font-size:15px;color:var(--muted);line-height:1.9;margin-bottom:20px;">The thermal circuit at Meridian draws from centuries of Nordic tradition. Moving between heat and cold is not a trend — it is one of the most well-researched protocols for cardiovascular health, stress regulation, and recovery.</p>
        <p style="font-size:15px;color:var(--muted);line-height:1.9;">Surrounding it all: fire, water, greenery, and seating designed for conversation. The experience is as social as it is restorative.</p>
      </div>
      <div class="reveal reveal-delay-2">
        <div style="display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:16px;">
          <div style="padding:24px;background:var(--dark2);border:1px solid rgba(184,150,90,0.08);border-radius:4px;transition:all 0.3s;" onmouseover="this.style.borderColor='rgba(184,150,90,0.3)'" onmouseout="this.style.borderColor='rgba(184,150,90,0.08)'">
            <div style="display:flex;align-items:center;gap:14px;margin-bottom:10px;">
              <div style="width:36px;height:36px;border-radius:50%;background:rgba(184,150,90,0.12);border:1px solid var(--gold-border);display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;font-size:16px;">🌡️</div>
              <div style="font-family:'Cormorant Garamond',serif;font-size:18px;font-weight:400;color:var(--text);">Barrel Sauna</div>
            </div>
            <p style="font-size:13px;color:var(--muted);line-height:1.7;">Traditional Finnish barrel sauna. Dry heat 70–90°C. Promotes deep muscle relaxation, improves circulation, and triggers cardiovascular adaptations equivalent to moderate exercise.</p>
          </div>
          <div style="padding:24px;background:var(--dark2);border:1px solid rgba(184,150,90,0.08);border-radius:4px;transition:all 0.3s;" onmouseover="this.style.borderColor='rgba(184,150,90,0.3)'" onmouseout="this.style.borderColor='rgba(184,150,90,0.08)'">
            <div style="display:flex;align-items:center;gap:14px;margin-bottom:10px;">
              <div style="width:36px;height:36px;border-radius:50%;background:rgba(96,165,250,0.1);border:1px solid rgba(96,165,250,0.25);display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;font-size:16px;">❄️</div>
              <div style="font-family:'Cormorant Garamond',serif;font-size:18px;font-weight:400;color:var(--text);">Cold Plunge</div>
            </div>
            <p style="font-size:13px;color:var(--muted);line-height:1.7;">Cold water immersion 10–15°C. Reduces inflammation, spikes norepinephrine up to 300%, and produces a lasting mood elevation that research shows persists for hours after exposure.</p>
          </div>
          <div style="padding:24px;background:var(--dark2);border:1px solid rgba(184,150,90,0.08);border-radius:4px;transition:all 0.3s;" onmouseover="this.style.borderColor='rgba(184,150,90,0.3)'" onmouseout="this.style.borderColor='rgba(184,150,90,0.08)'">
            <div style="display:flex;align-items:center;gap:14px;margin-bottom:10px;">
              <div style="width:36px;height:36px;border-radius:50%;background:rgba(184,150,90,0.12);border:1px solid var(--gold-border);display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;font-size:16px;">🔥</div>
              <div style="font-family:'Cormorant Garamond',serif;font-size:18px;font-weight:400;color:var(--text);">Social Fire & Hot Tub</div>
            </div>
            <p style="font-size:13px;color:var(--muted);line-height:1.7;">The rest interval is not empty time — it is where connection happens. Fire pit seating and a hot tub between circuits create the conditions for the kind of conversation that modern life rarely allows.</p>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

<style>
@media(max-width:768px){
  .concept-grid{grid-template-columns:1fr !important;gap:40px !important;}
}
</style>

<!-- APP SECTION -->
<div id="app" class="app-section">
  <div class="app-inner">
    <div>
      <div class="reveal">
        <div class="section-eyebrow">Included with Membership</div>
        <h2 class="section-title">Your personal<br>health companion</h2>
        <div class="section-divider"></div>
        <p class="section-body">Every Meridian member receives access to our companion app — a personal health operating system that connects your Apple Watch data, nutrition, workouts, and recovery into one elegant dashboard.</p>
      </div>
      <div class="app-features">
        <div class="app-feature reveal reveal-delay-1">
          <div class="af-icon">📊</div>
          <div><div class="af-title">Live Health Dashboard</div><div class="af-body">Weight, sleep, HRV, REM, resting HR, steps — synced from Apple Watch, displayed at a glance every morning.</div></div>
        </div>
        <div class="app-feature reveal reveal-delay-2">
          <div class="af-icon">✦</div>
          <div><div class="af-title">AI-Powered Logging</div><div class="af-body">Describe your meal or workout in plain English. AI extracts every item — no tapping through databases.</div></div>
        </div>
        <div class="app-feature reveal reveal-delay-3">
          <div class="af-icon">📅</div>
          <div><div class="af-title">AI Schedule Coaching</div><div class="af-body">Update your daily schedule with natural language. "Move my gym session to 6am" — done instantly.</div></div>
        </div>
        <div class="app-feature reveal reveal-delay-4">
          <div class="af-icon">📸</div>
          <div><div class="af-title">Progress Tracking</div><div class="af-body">Monthly progress photos, body fat estimation, biomarker labs from Function Health — all in one place.</div></div>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div style="margin-top:36px;" class="reveal">
        <a href="https://gbono2026.github.io/my-schedule" target="_blank" class="btn-outline">Open the App →</a>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="app-phone-wrap reveal reveal-delay-2">
      <div class="app-phone">
        <div class="app-phone::before"></div>
        <div class="phone-screen">
          <div class="phone-logo">
            <img src="data:image/png;base64," style="width:28px;height:28px;object-fit:contain;">
          </div>
          <div class="phone-wordmark">Meridian</div>
          <div class="phone-stat-grid">
            <div class="ps"><div class="ps-val">173.6</div><div class="ps-lbl">lbs</div></div>
            <div class="ps"><div class="ps-val">7.4</div><div class="ps-lbl">sleep</div></div>
            <div class="ps"><div class="ps-val">62</div><div class="ps-lbl">HRV</div></div>
            <div class="ps"><div class="ps-val">8,241</div><div class="ps-lbl">steps</div></div>
            <div class="ps"><div class="ps-val">1.8</div><div class="ps-lbl">REM</div></div>
            <div class="ps"><div class="ps-val">54</div><div class="ps-lbl">rhr</div></div>
          </div>
          <div style="height:8px;"></div>
          <div class="phone-label">Today's Nutrition</div>
          <div class="phone-bar"><div class="phone-bar-fill"></div></div>
          <div class="phone-meal"><span class="pm-name">Breakfast</span><span class="pm-cal">420 kcal</span></div>
          <div class="phone-meal"><span class="pm-name">Lunch</span><span class="pm-cal">610 kcal</span></div>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>


<!-- THE SCIENCE / PHILOSOPHY SECTION -->
<div id="science" style="background:var(--dark);border-top:1px solid rgba(184,150,90,0.12);">
<section style="padding:100px 40px;max-width:1200px;margin:0 auto;">

  <!-- Opening statement -->
  <div class="reveal" style="text-align:center;max-width:780px;margin:0 auto 80px;">
    <div class="section-eyebrow" style="text-align:center;">The Science</div>
    <h2 style="font-family:'Cormorant Garamond',serif;font-size:clamp(32px,5vw,58px);font-weight:300;line-height:1.1;margin-bottom:24px;">Alignment with nature is<br><em style="color:var(--gold-light);">the mechanism, not a metaphor</em></h2>
    <div class="section-divider" style="margin:0 auto 32px;"></div>
    <p style="font-size:16px;color:var(--muted);line-height:1.9;">Every other wellness brand is selling you a product. Meridian is built on a different premise entirely — that the body already knows how to heal, slow its aging, and thrive. It simply needs the right environment to do so.</p>
  </div>


  <!-- Differentiator quote -->
  <div class="reveal" style="background:var(--dark2);border:1px solid var(--gold-border);border-radius:4px;padding:52px 60px;margin-bottom:64px;position:relative;overflow:hidden;">
    <div style="position:absolute;top:0;left:0;right:0;height:1px;background:linear-gradient(90deg,transparent,var(--gold),transparent);"></div>
    <p style="font-family:'Cormorant Garamond',serif;font-size:clamp(20px,2.8vw,32px);font-weight:300;font-style:italic;line-height:1.5;color:var(--text);margin-bottom:24px;">"Meridian is a monument to a different idea entirely — that we are all oriented toward the same thing. Life. Light. More time. Better time."</p>
    <p style="font-size:14px;color:var(--muted);line-height:1.9;max-width:680px;">This is what separates Meridian from every wellness brand that came before it. Not a product. Not a treatment. A framework — rooted in ancient practice and validated by the most compelling edge of modern science.</p>
  </div>

  <!-- Science pillars - 4 detailed cards -->
  <div style="display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;gap:20px;margin-bottom:64px;" class="science-grid">

    <div class="reveal reveal-delay-1" style="background:var(--dark2);border:1px solid rgba(184,150,90,0.1);border-radius:4px;padding:36px;transition:border-color 0.3s;" onmouseover="this.style.borderColor='rgba(184,150,90,0.35)'" onmouseout="this.style.borderColor='rgba(184,150,90,0.1)'">
      <div style="font-size:10px;letter-spacing:3px;text-transform:uppercase;color:var(--gold);margin-bottom:16px;">Telomere Research</div>
      <h3 style="font-family:'Cormorant Garamond',serif;font-size:22px;font-weight:400;margin-bottom:14px;color:var(--text);">Stress shortens your biological clock</h3>
      <p style="font-size:13px;color:var(--muted);line-height:1.8;margin-bottom:16px;">Telomeres — the protective caps on your chromosomes — shorten with every cell division. Chronic stress, isolation, and inflammation accelerate this process measurably. Shorter telomeres correlate directly with earlier onset of age-related disease.</p>
      <p style="font-size:13px;color:var(--muted);line-height:1.8;">Thermal contrast, social bonding, and stress reduction have all been shown to slow telomere attrition. The lifestyle Meridian provides is, at the cellular level, a longevity intervention.</p>
    </div>

    <div class="reveal reveal-delay-2" style="background:var(--dark2);border:1px solid rgba(184,150,90,0.1);border-radius:4px;padding:36px;transition:border-color 0.3s;" onmouseover="this.style.borderColor='rgba(184,150,90,0.35)'" onmouseout="this.style.borderColor='rgba(184,150,90,0.1)'">
      <div style="font-size:10px;letter-spacing:3px;text-transform:uppercase;color:var(--gold);margin-bottom:16px;">Methylation Clocks</div>
      <h3 style="font-family:'Cormorant Garamond',serif;font-size:22px;font-weight:400;margin-bottom:14px;color:var(--text);">Your biological age is not fixed</h3>
      <p style="font-size:13px;color:var(--muted);line-height:1.8;margin-bottom:16px;">DNA methylation clocks — pioneered by researchers including Dr. David Sinclair at Harvard — can now measure biological age independently of chronological age. People with identical birthdays can have biological ages decades apart.</p>
      <p style="font-size:13px;color:var(--muted);line-height:1.8;">The inputs that drive biological age younger: reduced chronic stress, quality sleep, community, thermal hormesis, and a sense of purpose. Every one of these is built into the Meridian experience.</p>
    </div>

    <div class="reveal reveal-delay-3" style="background:var(--dark2);border:1px solid rgba(184,150,90,0.1);border-radius:4px;padding:36px;transition:border-color 0.3s;" onmouseover="this.style.borderColor='rgba(184,150,90,0.35)'" onmouseout="this.style.borderColor='rgba(184,150,90,0.1)'">
      <div style="font-size:10px;letter-spacing:3px;text-transform:uppercase;color:var(--gold);margin-bottom:16px;">Thermal Hormesis</div>
      <h3 style="font-family:'Cormorant Garamond',serif;font-size:22px;font-weight:400;margin-bottom:14px;color:var(--text);">Controlled stress that makes you stronger</h3>
      <p style="font-size:13px;color:var(--muted);line-height:1.8;margin-bottom:16px;">Heat activates heat shock proteins that repair cellular damage. Cold exposure spikes norepinephrine up to 300%, reduces systemic inflammation, and produces mood elevation that persists for hours. Alternating between the two is one of the most researched longevity protocols in existence.</p>
      <p style="font-size:13px;color:var(--muted);line-height:1.8;">This is not trend science. Sauna culture has existed in Finland for thousands of years. The research is finally catching up to what Nordic populations have known intuitively.</p>
    </div>

    <div class="reveal reveal-delay-4" style="background:var(--dark2);border:1px solid rgba(184,150,90,0.1);border-radius:4px;padding:36px;transition:border-color 0.3s;" onmouseover="this.style.borderColor='rgba(184,150,90,0.35)'" onmouseout="this.style.borderColor='rgba(184,150,90,0.1)'">
      <div style="font-size:10px;letter-spacing:3px;text-transform:uppercase;color:var(--gold);margin-bottom:16px;">Social Biology</div>
      <h3 style="font-family:'Cormorant Garamond',serif;font-size:22px;font-weight:400;margin-bottom:14px;color:var(--text);">Connection is a survival mechanism</h3>
      <p style="font-size:13px;color:var(--muted);line-height:1.8;margin-bottom:16px;">Loneliness carries a mortality risk equivalent to smoking 15 cigarettes a day. It elevates cortisol chronically, disrupts sleep architecture, and accelerates cognitive decline. This is not sociology — it is biology.</p>
      <p style="font-size:13px;color:var(--muted);line-height:1.8;">The rest interval between thermal circuits at Meridian is not empty time. It is where the most important part of the protocol happens — the fire, the conversation, the presence of other people who chose to be here for the same reason.</p>
    </div>

  </div>

  <!-- Bottom thesis -->
  <div class="reveal" style="text-align:center;max-width:700px;margin:0 auto;">
    <p style="font-family:'Cormorant Garamond',serif;font-size:clamp(18px,2.5vw,26px);font-weight:300;font-style:italic;line-height:1.6;color:var(--text);margin-bottom:20px;">"Environment is upstream of genetics in meaningful ways. This is not fringe science anymore. It is becoming the dominant framework in longevity research."</p>
    <p style="font-size:14px;color:var(--muted);line-height:1.9;">The goal is not to live to 150. The goal is to reach 95 with the body and mind of someone half that age — fully present, fully connected, fully alive. Meridian exists to make that achievable.</p>
    <div style="margin-top:40px;">
      <a href="#membership" class="btn-outline">Join the Waitlist</a>
    </div>
  </div>

</section>
</div>

<!-- CONCEPT LOCATIONS -->
<div id="locations" style="background:var(--dark2);border-top:1px solid rgba(184,150,90,0.12);">
<section style="padding:100px 40px;max-width:1200px;margin:0 auto;">
  <div class="reveal">
    <div class="section-eyebrow">Concept Locations</div>
    <h2 class="section-title">Three expressions<br><em style="color:var(--gold-light);font-style:italic;">of one vision</em></h2>
    <div class="section-divider"></div>
    <p style="font-size:15px;color:var(--muted);line-height:1.9;max-width:620px;margin-bottom:60px;">From an intimate lakeside sanctuary to an architectural statement in the Nevada desert — each Meridian location expresses the same philosophy through a different lens.</p>
  </div>

  <!-- Location 1: Lakeside -->
  <div style="margin-bottom:80px;" class="reveal">
    <div style="background:var(--dark3);border:1px solid rgba(184,150,90,0.12);border-radius:4px;overflow:hidden;">
      <div style="position:relative;overflow:hidden;max-height:480px;">
        <img src="data:image/jpeg;base64," 
             alt="Meridian Lakeside concept — triangular glass building on lake at sunset"
             style="width:100%;height:480px;object-fit:cover;object-position:center 35%;display:block;">
        <div style="position:absolute;inset:0;background:linear-gradient(180deg,transparent 50%,rgba(8,9,13,0.7) 100%);"></div>
      </div>
      <div style="padding:36px 40px;display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;gap:48px;" class="loc-detail-grid">
        <div>
          <div style="font-size:10px;letter-spacing:3px;text-transform:uppercase;color:var(--gold);margin-bottom:8px;">Location 01</div>
          <h3 style="font-family:'Cormorant Garamond',serif;font-size:28px;font-weight:300;margin-bottom:16px;">Lakeside</h3>
          <p style="font-size:14px;color:var(--muted);line-height:1.8;">The founding location. A modern building on the water, oriented toward the sunset. The lake becomes part of the thermal experience — cold plunge, open water, natural contrast. This is where the Meridian culture is established and the brand is proven.</p>
        </div>
        <div style="display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:10px;">
          <div style="font-size:11px;letter-spacing:1px;text-transform:uppercase;color:var(--muted);margin-bottom:4px;">Features</div>
          <div style="font-size:13px;color:var(--text);padding:8px 0;border-bottom:1px solid rgba(184,150,90,0.08);">— Barrel sauna with lake views</div>
          <div style="font-size:13px;color:var(--text);padding:8px 0;border-bottom:1px solid rgba(184,150,90,0.08);">— Cold plunge & hot tub circuit</div>
          <div style="font-size:13px;color:var(--text);padding:8px 0;border-bottom:1px solid rgba(184,150,90,0.08);">— Fire pit social terrace</div>
          <div style="font-size:13px;color:var(--text);padding:8px 0;border-bottom:1px solid rgba(184,150,90,0.08);">— Dock & open water access</div>
          <div style="font-size:13px;color:var(--text);padding:8px 0;">— Modern low-profile architecture</div>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>

  <!-- Location 2: Urban -->
  <div style="margin-bottom:80px;" class="reveal">
    <div style="background:var(--dark3);border:1px solid rgba(184,150,90,0.12);border-radius:4px;overflow:hidden;">
      <div style="position:relative;overflow:hidden;max-height:480px;">
        <img src="data:image/jpeg;base64," 
             alt="Meridian Urban concept — rooftop infinity pool facing city sunset"
             style="width:100%;height:480px;object-fit:cover;object-position:center 40%;display:block;">
        <div style="position:absolute;inset:0;background:linear-gradient(180deg,transparent 50%,rgba(8,9,13,0.7) 100%);"></div>
      </div>
      <div style="padding:36px 40px;display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;gap:48px;" class="loc-detail-grid">
        <div>
          <div style="font-size:10px;letter-spacing:3px;text-transform:uppercase;color:var(--gold);margin-bottom:8px;">Location 02</div>
          <h3 style="font-family:'Cormorant Garamond',serif;font-size:28px;font-weight:300;margin-bottom:16px;">Urban</h3>
          <p style="font-size:14px;color:var(--muted);line-height:1.8;">A city location with sunset exposure. Modern glass rising from an archaic stone plinth — the tension between the contemporary and the timeless, which mirrors the philosophy itself. Rooftop infinity pool facing the horizon. Higher foot traffic, broader reach, same intentionality.</p>
        </div>
        <div style="display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:10px;">
          <div style="font-size:11px;letter-spacing:1px;text-transform:uppercase;color:var(--muted);margin-bottom:4px;">Features</div>
          <div style="font-size:13px;color:var(--text);padding:8px 0;border-bottom:1px solid rgba(184,150,90,0.08);">— Modern glass tower on stone plinth</div>
          <div style="font-size:13px;color:var(--text);padding:8px 0;border-bottom:1px solid rgba(184,150,90,0.08);">— Rooftop infinity pool toward sunset</div>
          <div style="font-size:13px;color:var(--text);padding:8px 0;border-bottom:1px solid rgba(184,150,90,0.08);">— Full thermal circuit indoors</div>
          <div style="font-size:13px;color:var(--text);padding:8px 0;border-bottom:1px solid rgba(184,150,90,0.08);">— Archaic column entrance</div>
          <div style="font-size:13px;color:var(--text);padding:8px 0;">— City-level social commons</div>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>

  <!-- Location 3: Las Vegas Flagship -->
  <div class="reveal">
    <div style="background:var(--dark3);border:1px solid var(--gold-border);border-radius:4px;overflow:hidden;position:relative;">
      <div style="position:absolute;top:16px;right:16px;font-size:9px;letter-spacing:2px;text-transform:uppercase;color:var(--gold);background:var(--gold-dim);padding:4px 12px;border-radius:2px;border:1px solid var(--gold-border);z-index:2;">The Flagship Vision</div>
      <div style="position:relative;overflow:hidden;max-height:520px;">
        <img src="data:image/png;base64," 
             alt="Meridian Las Vegas flagship — three towers, infinity pools facing the sun"
             style="width:100%;height:520px;object-fit:cover;object-position:center 30%;display:block;">
        <div style="position:absolute;inset:0;background:linear-gradient(180deg,transparent 55%,rgba(8,9,13,0.7) 100%);"></div>
      </div>
      <div style="padding:36px 40px;display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;gap:48px;" class="loc-detail-grid">
        <div>
          <div style="font-size:10px;letter-spacing:3px;text-transform:uppercase;color:var(--gold);margin-bottom:8px;">The Flagship</div>
          <h3 style="font-family:'Cormorant Garamond',serif;font-size:28px;font-weight:300;margin-bottom:16px;">Las Vegas</h3>
          <p style="font-size:14px;color:var(--muted);line-height:1.8;margin-bottom:14px;">Three black towers arranged in a triangle. One apex elevated above the others. Each tower has an infinity pool — and all three pools face the same direction, toward the sun on the horizon.</p>
          <p style="font-size:14px;color:var(--muted);line-height:1.8;">Three separate structures. One shared orientation. This is not a design choice — it is a declaration. We are all oriented toward the same thing.</p>
        </div>
        <div style="display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:10px;">
          <div style="font-size:11px;letter-spacing:1px;text-transform:uppercase;color:var(--muted);margin-bottom:4px;">The Symbolism</div>
          <div style="font-size:13px;color:var(--text);padding:8px 0;border-bottom:1px solid rgba(184,150,90,0.08);">— Triangle formation: three points, one form</div>
          <div style="font-size:13px;color:var(--text);padding:8px 0;border-bottom:1px solid rgba(184,150,90,0.08);">— Elevated apex: aspiration, reaching the meridian</div>
          <div style="font-size:13px;color:var(--text);padding:8px 0;border-bottom:1px solid rgba(184,150,90,0.08);">— All pools face the sun: unity of purpose</div>
          <div style="font-size:13px;color:var(--text);padding:8px 0;border-bottom:1px solid rgba(184,150,90,0.08);">— Sky bridges: connection between independent forms</div>
          <div style="font-size:13px;color:var(--gold);padding:8px 0;font-style:italic;">— "We all share one sense of purpose"</div>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>
</div>

<style>
@media(max-width:768px){
  .science-grid{grid-template-columns:1fr !important;gap:40px !important;}
  .loc-detail-grid{grid-template-columns:1fr !important;gap:28px !important;}
}
</style>

<!-- MEMBERSHIP -->
<div id="membership" style="background:var(--dark2);border-top:1px solid rgba(184,150,90,0.12);">
<section>
  <div class="reveal">
    <div class="section-eyebrow">Membership</div>
    <h2 class="section-title">Find your meridian</h2>
    <div class="section-divider"></div>
    <p class="section-body">Meridian is currently in development. Join the waitlist to be among our founding members — the first to experience the center when we open.</p>
  </div>
  <div class="membership-grid">
    <div class="membership-card reveal reveal-delay-1">
      <div class="mc-title">Essential</div>
      <div class="mc-price">Pricing to be announced</div>
      <ul class="mc-features">
        <li>Full thermal experience access</li>
        <li>Social commons &amp; lounge</li>
        <li>Movement studio classes</li>
        <li>Meridian companion app</li>
        <li>Health dashboard &amp; tracking</li>
      </ul>
    </div>
    <div class="membership-card featured reveal reveal-delay-2">
      <div class="mc-title">Founding Member</div>
      <div class="mc-price">Early access · Priority pricing</div>
      <ul class="mc-features">
        <li>Everything in Essential</li>
        <li>Locked founding member rate for life</li>
        <li>Priority booking on all facilities</li>
        <li>Direct input on center programming</li>
        <li>Early app access &amp; beta features</li>
        <li>Personal health coaching sessions</li>
      </ul>
    </div>
    <div class="membership-card reveal reveal-delay-3">
      <div class="mc-title">Wellness+</div>
      <div class="mc-price">Pricing to be announced</div>
      <ul class="mc-features">
        <li>Everything in Essential</li>
        <li>Function Health lab integration</li>
        <li>Advanced biomarker tracking</li>
        <li>1:1 wellness consultations</li>
        <li>Nutrition &amp; recovery planning</li>
      </ul>
    </div>
  </div>

  <!-- WAITLIST FORM -->
  <div class="reveal" style="margin-top:64px;text-align:center;">
    <div style="max-width:480px;margin:0 auto;">
      <p class="section-eyebrow" style="text-align:center;margin-bottom:12px;">Join the Waitlist</p>
      <h3 style="font-family:'Cormorant Garamond',serif;font-size:28px;font-weight:300;margin-bottom:8px;">Be among the first</h3>
      <p style="font-size:13px;color:var(--muted);margin-bottom:32px;line-height:1.8;">We'll reach out as we get closer to opening with founding member details, pricing, and early app access.</p>
      <div style="display:flex;gap:8px;max-width:400px;margin:0 auto;">
        <input type="email" placeholder="your@email.com" style="flex:1;padding:14px 18px;background:var(--dark3);border:1px solid var(--gold-border);border-radius:2px;color:var(--text);font-family:'Jost',sans-serif;font-size:14px;outline:none;">
        <button onclick="submitWaitlist(this)" style="padding:14px 24px;background:var(--gold);border:none;border-radius:2px;color:#0a0900;font-family:'Jost',sans-serif;font-size:11px;font-weight:500;letter-spacing:2px;text-transform:uppercase;cursor:pointer;white-space:nowrap;">Join</button>
      </div>
      <div id="waitlist-confirm" style="display:none;margin-top:16px;font-size:13px;color:var(--gold-light);">✦ You're on the list. We'll be in touch.</div>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>
</div>

<!-- FOOTER -->
<footer>
  <div class="footer-logo">
    <img src="data:image/png;base64," alt="Meridian">
    <span class="footer-wordmark">Meridian</span>
  </div>
  <p class="footer-tagline">Spa &amp; Wellness — Reach your meridian</p>
  <div class="footer-links">
    <a href="#philosophy">Philosophy</a>
    <a href="#experience">Experience</a>
    <a href="#spa">The Spa</a>
    <a href="#science">Science</a>
    <a href="#locations">Locations</a>
    <a href="#app">The App</a>
    <a href="#membership">Membership</a>
    <a href="https://gbono2026.github.io/my-schedule" target="_blank">Open App</a>
  </div>
  <p class="footer-copy">© 2026 Meridian Spa &amp; Wellness. All rights reserved.</p>
</footer>

<script>
// Scroll reveal
const observer = new IntersectionObserver((entries)=>{
  entries.forEach(e=>{ if(e.isIntersecting) e.target.classList.add('visible'); });
},{threshold:0.1});
document.querySelectorAll('.reveal').forEach(el=>observer.observe(el));

// Waitlist
function submitWaitlist(btn){
  const input = btn.previousElementSibling;
  if(!input.value||!input.value.includes('@')){ input.style.borderColor='#e24b4a'; return; }
  input.style.borderColor='var(--gold-border)';
  btn.textContent='✓';
  btn.style.background='#3B6D11';
  document.getElementById('waitlist-confirm').style.display='block';
  input.value='';
}
</script>
</body>
</html>
